item.title: U.S. Senate crypto market structure bill misses July 4 deadline, passage odds fall to 40-50% with August 7 recess as final window
SEC and CFTC jointly classified 18 major cryptocurrencies as digital commodities in March 2026 interpretation establishing token taxonomy
EU MiCA transitional period ended July 1, mandating all crypto service providers hold full CASP authorization or cease EU operations
U.S. GENIUS Act stablecoin rules deadline is July 18, requiring permitted issuers to maintain 1:1 liquid reserves and public attestations
Ripple obtained full MiCA CASP authorization from Luxembourg's CSSF on July 6, enabling regulated crypto payments in all 30 EEA countries
Coinbase secured UK MiFID authorization on July 7, adding equities and derivatives to its regulated product suite for UK customers
An attacker spent $4M in BONK tokens on July 6 to pass a malicious governance proposal, draining $20M from BonkDAO's treasury
BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize listed on NYSE in early July via SPAC merger with Cantor Equity Partners II, raising $400M
CFTC approved cash-settled Bitcoin perpetual futures contracts in May 2026, permitting registered U.S. exchanges to list them
Bank of America authorized 15,000 financial advisors to recommend spot Bitcoin ETFs and advise 1-4% crypto allocations to clients
JPMorgan filed to launch JLTXX, a tokenized U.S. Treasury fund on Ethereum targeting GENIUS Act stablecoin issuers as compliant reserves
Fidelity launched a GENIUS Act-compliant stablecoin reserve fund investing in short-term U.S. Treasuries with a 0.18% expense ratio
SEC cleared the Depository Trust Company via no-action letter to tokenize Russell 1000 stocks, U.S. equity ETFs, and Treasury securities
280 firms secured full EU MiCA CASP authorization by July 3, including 15 of the top 100 crypto exchanges by trading volume
BlackRock and JPMorgan joined 33 others in an Ethereum adoption nonprofit launched July 4 to target integration by traditional finance firms
